entry.text: tattvajñāna-vikāśini  vidyā  brahma  parā || ōm  jaya ||
entry.iast: tattvajñāna-vikāśini  vidyā  brahma  parā || ōm  jaya ||

entry.text: śaraṇa-rahasya-pradāyini  saba  vidhi  sukhakārī || ōm  jaya ||
entry.iast: śaraṇa-rahasya-pradāyini  saba  vidhi  sukhakārī || ōm  jaya ||

entry.text: daivī  sadguṇadāyini  hari-rasikā  sajanī || ōm  jaya ||
entry.iast: daivī  sadguṇadāyini  hari-rasikā  sajanī || ōm  jaya ||

entry.text: samatā  tyāga  sikhāvani  hari-mukha  kī  vāṇī |
entry.iast: samatā  tyāga  sikhāvani  hari-mukha  kī  vāṇī |

entry.text: sakala  śāstra  kī  svāmini  śrutiyō  kī  rānī || ōm  jaya ||
entry.iast: sakala  śāstra  kī  svāmini  śrutiyō  kī  rānī || ōm  jaya ||

entry.text: hari-pada-prēma  pradāyini  apanō  kara  lījai || ōm  jaya ||
entry.iast: hari-pada-prēma  pradāyini  apanō  kara  lījai || ōm  jaya ||
